reformat_resume:
John Doe

john@example.com | 555-1234

Summary

Dedicated full-stack software developer with experience building and scaling APIs, microservices, and distributed systems. Proven ability to lead engineering teams and deliver high-availability solutions. Seeking a new opportunity to apply expertise in Python, back-end architecture, and modern DevOps practices.

Work History

Senior Developer — TechStart Inc. Feb 2023 – Present

  • Designed and implemented microservices architecture supporting high-availability requirements.
  • Scaled the system to 100,000 users and 100 million requests per month using a novel caching strategy.
  • Managed CI/CD pipelines and participated in on-call rotation to ensure system reliability.

Developer — Acme Corp 2020 – 2023

  • Built and maintained RESTful APIs using Python.
  • Identified and resolved software defects to improve system stability.
  • Mentored and led 2 junior developers.

Education

Bachelor of Science, Computer Science — State University 2016

GPA: 3.8

Skills

Python | Java | SQL | Docker | Kubernetes

logical_rewriting: We are pleased to announce the release of LocalWriter version 2.0, a major advancement in local AI-assisted writing for word processors. This update introduces a sophisticated Judge system that employs multi-dimensional scoring models — including G-Eval and Prometheus frameworks — to deliver accurate, consistent evaluations of model performance beyond simple string matching, assessing semantic correctness, formatting fidelity, and naturalness. Version 2.0 also features a Dual-Mode evaluation system that applies weighted, task-specific criteria to distinguish between structural tasks (such as table generation) and creative tasks (such as logical rewriting). Additionally, OpenRouter integration has been optimized to support the latest model releases, including the Qwen 3.5 and Gemini 3 Flash series. Download the update today to experience the next generation of local AI writing assistance.
